title: Daily Weather
subtitle: Morning Istanbul weather notifications
previewNote: Preview data — live API coming soon.

notifications.title: Morning notification
notifications.description: Get a daily weather summary at your chosen time.
notifications.noPayloadYet: No test yet — send one from the Inspect menu.
notifications.permissionHint: On the mobile app, grant notification permission to receive pushes.
notifications.signInRequired: Sign in to save your preferences.

recommendations.title: Smart Recommendations
recommendations.storm: Stormy or thundery weather is expected. Be careful when going outside.
recommendations.snow: Chance of snow. Ground might be slippery, pay attention to footwear and transport.
recommendations.morningRain: High chance of rain around %{hour}:00 am (%%{prob}). Bringing an umbrella is a good idea.
recommendations.afternoonRain: Rain expected around %{hour}:00 pm (%%{prob}). You might want to adjust your plans.
recommendations.eveningRain: Chance of rain around %{hour}:00 pm (%%{prob}). You might need an umbrella on your way back.
recommendations.umbrella: High chance of rain (%%{prob}). Good idea to bring an umbrella or a raincoat.
recommendations.veryWindy: Wind speed might be very high (%{speed} km/h). Be careful in open spaces.
recommendations.windy: It is quite windy (%{speed} km/h). It might feel colder than it actually is.
recommendations.breezy: There is a slight breeze (%{speed} km/h). A light jacket could be nice.
recommendations.fog: Fog or mist is expected. Especially be careful in traffic during morning hours.
recommendations.eveningCold: Temperature drops to around %{temp}°C after %{hour}:00. Good idea to bring a layer.
recommendations.bigTempDiff: High temperature range today: %{min}°C - %{max}°C. Dressing in layers is recommended.
recommendations.jacket: Temperature might change throughout the day. Bringing a light jacket is a good idea.
recommendations.veryCold: Weather is very cold. Make sure to dress warm and protect against wind.
recommendations.cold: Chilly weather. A jacket or a warm top would be appropriate.
recommendations.extremeHot: Extremely hot weather. Drink plenty of water and avoid long exposure to sun.
recommendations.hot: Hot weather. Light clothing and staying hydrated is recommended.
recommendations.humidHot: High humidity (%%{humidity}). It might feel more sweltering than it actually is.
recommendations.humidCold: High humidity (%%{humidity}). Chilly weather might feel even colder.
recommendations.dryAir: Air is quite dry (%%{humidity}). Don't forget to drink water.
recommendations.ideal: Weather looks ideal. Great day to spend time outdoors.
recommendations.moderate: Pleasant and comfortable temperature. Light clothing should be enough.
recommendations.umbrellaHigh: High chance of rain (%%{prob}). Good idea to bring an umbrella or a raincoat.
recommendations.umbrellaMedium: Chance of rain (%%{prob}). Bringing an umbrella might be wise if you are out long.
recommendations.lightRainChance: Brief rain is possible (%%{prob}). Keep that in mind when making plans.
recommendations.rainWindCombined: Rain chance and wind might be active together. A raincoat could be more comfortable than an umbrella, and bringing a light jacket is wise.
recommendations.rainColdCombined: There is a chance of rain and it might get chilly. Better to bring an umbrella/raincoat along with a layer to wear.
recommendations.windColdCombined: Wind and cool air together can lower the perceived temperature. A light but windproof jacket would be ideal.
recommendations.coolMorningWarmDay: Morning might be cool around %{morning}°C, warming up to %{afternoon}°C during the day. Better to bring a light jacket if leaving early.
